description_long: This is a modern, two-story house situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn. The house features a flat, multi-tiered roof with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. Large windows are present on all sides, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and a covered porch supported by simple columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with subtle wooden accents around the entry and some window frames. The overall design emphasizes geometric simplicity and functional elegance, typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat, multi-level roof, large windows, and a minimalist entryway with steps and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain wall with a few windows and a small protruding section.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more visible window arrangements and a secondary protruding section.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a set of double doors and symmetrical window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on all sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, covered porch, and simple columns
